name: hk-skills
description: hk's personal Claude Code skill marketplace, organized into opt-in plugin bundles for common development workflows, web, React Native, and Supabase.

plugins.name: web
plugins.description: Web frontend (React/Next/Vite): design, Tailwind, UI/UX, Framer Motion, React best-practices/composition, shadcn, Storybook, Playwright, TanStack (Query/Form/Table), Turborepo, Vercel deploy, API-only client/server boundary, frontend state policy.

plugins.name: rn
plugins.description: React Native / Expo mobile. (Placeholder — 아직 스킬 없음. RN 프로젝트 시작 시 skills/에 추가.)

plugins.name: supabase
plugins.description: Supabase + Postgres: client/SSR, auth/RLS, migrations, query & schema best-practices.

plugins.name: hk
plugins.description: hk personal cross-project custom commands. /hk:pre-clear:save & /hk:pre-clear:resume — hand off session context around /clear (writes/reads .hk/pre-clear/handoff.md).

plugins.name: orca
plugins.description: Standalone Orca orchestration bundle. Skill `orca-workers` — coordinate parallel sub-worktree workers for one feature/page cycle (provision → brief → supervised dispatch → cross-model Codex review → fix loop → integration landing). Bundles the official `orca-cli`, `orchestration` & `computer-use` skills (vendored verbatim from stablyai/orca, MIT — see NOTICE.md) so it needs no locally-installed Orca skills.
